title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 34.046 - Contract directly with other governmental entities for purchase of supplies
text:
34.046.  Contract directly with other governmental entities for purchase of supplies. — The commissioner of administration may contract directly with other governmental entities for the purchase of supplies.  The commissioner of administration may also participate in, sponsor, conduct or administer a cooperative purchasing agreement whereby supplies are procured in accordance with a contract established by another governmental entity provided that such contract was established in accordance with the laws and regulations applicable to the establishing governmental entity.
(L. 1995 H.B. 562)
